name: Aix-en-Provence
pico_role: Southern France/provençal travel context pending direct evidence.

name: Arezzo
pico_role: Tuscan route context; used here as a tentative travel node pending source confirmation.

name: Bologna
pico_role: Early legal/university studies; later remembered as part of Pico and Savonarola's overlapping educational world.

name: Ferrara
pico_role: Este court and educational setting where Pico and Savonarola are said to have crossed paths.

name: Fiesole / Careggi
pico_role: Florentine villa/intellectual setting associated with Ficino and Medici Platonism.

name: Florence
pico_role: Medici city, Ficinian/Platonic milieu, later Savonarolan context, and Pico's final residence.

name: Grenoble
pico_role: Alpine route node between France and Italy pending direct evidence.

name: Lyon
pico_role: Major France-Italy route node; included for map routing pending direct evidence.

name: Mirandola
pico_role: Pico's family lordship and birthplace; later a site of civic memory and commemoration.

name: Modena
pico_role: Este-region political and ecclesiastical context near Mirandola.

name: Padua
pico_role: Major Aristotelian university context for Pico's philosophical education.

name: Paris
pico_role: Scholastic university center associated with Pico's northern studies and French intellectual ambit.

name: Pavia
pico_role: Northern Italian scholastic/university context relevant to Pico's legal and philosophical formation.

name: Perugia
pico_role: Central Italian study and travel context often associated with Pico's language and philosophical formation.

name: Reggio Emilia
pico_role: Reported Dominican chapter/disputation context for a young Pico encountering Savonarola.

name: Rome
pico_role: Site of Pico's planned disputation, papal scrutiny, condemnation of theses, and later absolution politics.

name: San Marco, Florence
pico_role: Dominican convent/library connected with Savonarola, Pico's late religious circle, burial, and posthumous memory.

name: Vincennes
pico_role: Traditional location associated with Pico's detention after the papal case; verify exact imprisonment details in Copenhaver/trial literature.
